draft.action_intent: Add the currently viewed product to the shopping cart with the specified quantity.
draft.notes: Quantity is determined by the adjacent number input (id=21, default 1). May trigger a modal confirmation or cart flyout.

draft.action_intent: Submit a product review including the user's name, email, and review text.
draft.notes: Submits user-provided review data to the server. Typically cannot be edited or deleted after submission on this site. Confirm whether reviews are publicly visible immediately or moderated.

draft.action_intent: Subscribe to the site's newsletter or mailing list by submitting an email address.
draft.notes: Button has no visible label text; inferred as a newsletter subscribe action based on nearby 'Your email address' input and its footer-area position. Unsubscribe is typically possible but requires a separate process. Reviewer should confirm the button's actual purpose.

draft.action_intent: Specify the quantity of the product to add to the cart.
draft.notes: Number input defaulting to 1. Value is consumed by the adjacent 'Add to cart' button. No server-side effect until the cart button is clicked.

draft.action_intent: Enter the reviewer's name as part of writing a product review.
draft.notes: Text input field for the review form. No data is sent until the Submit button is pressed.

draft.action_intent: Enter the reviewer's email address as part of writing a product review.
draft.notes: Email input field for the review form. No data is sent until the Submit button is pressed. Could be used for follow-up contact, but that's a post-submission concern.
